textByHashes.0f85cf5b0e605742e6c9ab9fdd00d1383d9434d4: Get away! One day we'll have our revenge on you all!
textByHashes.48f5db72c96d58270aac3898eef94d89d5a62ad0: Spare us your fake pity. I spit on Khazard, and all who do his bidding.
textByHashes.1f1f05eda17f473d7e544e7b53c3db4ab1f8c744: You're not safe here, traveller. Leave while you still can.
textByHashes.d3f0d27badc8c704e70ba89f87f3e34ece12c95c: You're brave coming in here. If the guards get you, you'll be the next one in a cell.
